design_plan: rng=42; AIDA=pass; hero_math=1120px 2–3 lines; bento_density=grid-auto-flow:dense; label_sweep=all competitors mentioned; button_contrast=pass
headline: Super vs Grok

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Grok. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Grok

summary: A fair, editorial comparison for people choosing between Super and Grok. Grok is advancing fast with agents, voice APIs, and private betas, while Super focuses on dependable computer-use agents that can reuse a computer-use cache to make repeated workflows cheaper and steadier over time.
